pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 13th consecutive poll with no changes. WIN count 69 unchanged, V51.1 unchanged. Canary NOT triggered (OTS still timestamps observations bundled with predictions, not predictions independently). All parameter canaries stable. API endpoints remain 404 via GitHub Pages.
pipeline_status.analyst: No new WIN files or proposals this run. 29 expansion tracker items pending across various sections. EXP-062 and EXP-064 unblocked and awaiting analyst pickup.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews in digest — all confirmed STALE via staleness gate. Issues ISS-880 through ISS-887 were previously created and closed/wonfix. Queue depth 13 at BAU mode (240min interval).
pipeline_status.integrity: Overall status FAIL due to FUSE staleness false alarms. Two failures are not real: (1) priority_queue_coupling shows EXP-050 as revision-submitted — clone has it as complete+integrated since 2026-04-12; (2) build_reproducibility shows stale FUSE index.html vs fresh build — clone HTML is current (0 diff after rebuild). 3311 tests pass. Expansion tracker warn: EXP-052 gap (known) and EXP-062/064 stale (now unblocked). Digest coverage failure (14 unprocessed reviews): 11 were already in processed-reviews.json by filename, 3 added this run — the integrity count may reflect pre-sync state.

pipeline_status.tinker: Not checked this run — no tinker report in workspace from last 24h.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes since last poll (2026-04-13T14:00Z). Last meaningful change was 2026-04-08 (AI backend build). Site stable at V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy claim.

internal_issues.description: Stale duplicate of ISS-882. Verbatim quote citation already added with wins.html + poller-captured date + raw-text reference in commit 84e62cb.
Stale duplicate of ISS-886. WIN-013 geometry-independent counter-argument already added in commit 74e8030.

SEC-2b.7-post-EXP137.c3: ALL 5 holes stale. 'systematically placed' removed (commit 74e8030), direction_correct paradox fixed (same commit), citation added with wins.html+raw-text (84e62cb), W004 qualifier added (same), 'five times' → 'five-and-a-half times' (74e8030). ISS-882+ISS-887 closed.

SEC-6.1-post-EXP086.c3: ALL 5 holes stale. n(r)+r_eq now cross-referenced to WIN-065/057, 'fitted then locked' ≠ 'derived then tested' added with G analogy, count updated to 'at least eight', IGRF range corrected to 55k-60k, WIN-013 defender counter added. ISS-881+ISS-886 closed.

recommended_actions.action: Analyst: Process EXP-062 and EXP-064 (now unblocked). EXP-062 = OTS gap rebuttal; EXP-064 = Part 6 prose update. Both are high-priority pending items.

Human: Review ISS-825 (pending-human) — EXP-050-r2 WIN-018 verdict flip proposal. Analyst recommends flipping WIN-018; this needs human judgment on whether the refraction cascade argument is strong enough.

Tinker: Investigate FUSE staleness issue causing integrity agent to read stale expansion-tracker.json (EXP-050 shows revision-submitted in FUSE but complete in clone since 2026-04-12). Workspace-sync should be handling this.
Human: Curmudgeon queue depth 13 items at BAU mode (240min intervals). Review queue items and consider bumping to churn-and-burn mode if throughput is insufficient.

self_apply_summary.note: No new patches this run. All 3 pending reviews confirmed stale. ISS-888 and ISS-889 closed as stale duplicates of previously-fixed ISS-882 and ISS-886. processed-reviews.json updated (228→231). Commit: 92eb8fe.
